_notes: Source tk-soft-observation has constraints tk-obs-1(error)/tk-obs-2(error), extensions deviceUsed/bodyPosition/observationMethod, code with extensible binding tk-soft VS, code.coding slicing with system/code min=1, performer targetProfile=[tk-soft/Practitioner, tk-soft/Organization], value[x] types=[Quantity,CodeableConcept,string], bodySite/method optional non-MS. Target hemas-observation has constraints hemas-obs-1(error)/hemas-obs-2(warning), extensions labSection/reportingPriority/criticalFlag, identifier with mandatory system/value, code.coding slicing loinc/local, performer reference widened, value[x] adds boolean, adds note/specimen/referenceRange.text as MS, removes bodySite/method.

drifts.description: Constraints removed in target: [tk-obs-1, tk-obs-2]
New error constraint added in target: hemas-obs-1 (Observation must have value or dataAbsentReason or component)
New warning constraint added in target: hemas-obs-2 (Lab results should have a specimen reference)
New MustSupport identifier element added in target (was not constrained in source)
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1] and MustSupport added in target
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1] and MustSupport added in target
MustSupport added on existing slice 'laboratory' in target
MustSupport added on existing slice 'vitalSigns' in target
Binding changed: extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/observation-code) -> extensible(https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/observation-code)
Slicing added in target: discriminator=[{type:pattern, path:$this}], rules=open
New slice 'loinc' added in target (mustSupport [0..1])
New slice 'local' added in target (mustSupport [0..1])
Cardinality changed: [1..1] -> [0..1] and MustSupport removed in target (constraints moved into slices)
Cardinality changed: [1..1] -> [0..1] and MustSupport removed in target (constraints moved into slices)
Reference target profile changed: [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient] -> [https://hemas.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient]
Reference target profile changed: [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Encounter] -> [https://hemas.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Encounter]
MustSupport added in target on optional element (was not constrained in source)

Reference target profile changed: [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Practitioner, https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization] -> [http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Practitioner, http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/PractitionerRole, http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization, http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/CareTeam, http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient, http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/RelatedPerson]
Type changed: [Quantity, CodeableConcept, string] -> [Quantity, CodeableConcept, string, boolean] (boolean added)
MustSupport added in target on optional element (was not constrained in source)

Binding changed in target: Source uses extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/body-site); hemas target uses example(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/body-site). Binding strength weakened (extensible→example), same VS.

Binding changed in target: Source uses extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/observation-method); hemas target uses example(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/observation-methods). Binding strength weakened (extensible→example), different VS.
MustSupport added in target on optional element (was not constrained in source)
MustSupport removed in target (element no longer constrained in target)
MustSupport added in target on optional element (was not constrained in source)
Extension removed in target profile: Observation.extension:deviceUsed (was mustSupport)
Extension removed in target profile: Observation.extension:bodyPosition (was mustSupport)
Extension removed in target profile: Observation.extension:observationMethod (was mustSupport)
Extension added in target profile: Observation.extension:labSection (mustSupport)
Extension added in target profile: Observation.extension:reportingPriority (mustSupport)
Extension added in target profile: Observation.extension:criticalFlag (mustSupport)
